# dockercompose Provider





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `docker_binary` (String) Path to the docker binary.
- `host` (String) Docker daemon host URL. Supports ssh://user@host, tcp://host:2376, unix:///path/to/socket. Defaults to DOCKER_HOST env var.
- `project_directory` (String) Base directory for storing generated docker-compose files. Defaults to ~/.terraform-docker-compose.
